debug_info.goal:
α nt : Type
⊢ ∀ (word : Word α) (G : ContextFreeGrammar α nt),
    word ∈ coerceLang α G.Z G.GeneratedLanguage → ∃ word₂ ∈ G.GeneratedLanguage, coerceWord α G.Z word₂ = word

proof:
intro word G h
  simp [coerceLang, coerceWord] at h ⊢
  rcases h with ⟨w, hw, heq⟩
  use w
  constructor
  · exact hw
  · exact heq
failed_attempts:
intro word G hw
  rw [show coerceLang α G.Z G.generatedLanguage = fun word => ∃ w, w ∈ G.generatedLanguage ∧ (coerceWord α G.Z w = word) by rfl] at hw
  rcases hw with ⟨word₂, hw_mem, hw_eq⟩
  exact ⟨word₂, hw_mem, hw_eq⟩

intro word G hw
  have h1 : ∃ w, w ∈ G.generatedLanguage ∧ (coerceWord w = word) := by 
    simpa using hw
  rcases h1 with ⟨w, hw1, hw2⟩
  refine ⟨w, hw1, hw2⟩

intro word G h
  have h1 : word ∈ coerceLang (G.Z) (G.generatedLanguage) := h
  simp [coerceLang] at h1
  rcases h1 with ⟨w, hw1, hw2⟩
  exact ⟨w, hw1, hw2⟩

intro word G h
  have h1 : ∃ w, w ∈ G.generatedLanguage ∧ (coerceWord α G.Z w = word) := by
    simpa using h
  rcases h1 with ⟨w, hw, h_eq⟩
  exact ⟨w, hw, h_eq⟩

intro word G h

  refine ⟨w, hw, h_eq⟩

intro word G hw
  have h1 : word ∈ coerceLang G.Z G.generatedLanguage := hw
  rw [show coerceLang G.Z G.generatedLanguage = fun word => ∃ w, w ∈ G.generatedLanguage ∧ (coerceWord w = word) by rfl] at h1
  rcases h1 with ⟨w, hw1, hw2⟩
  exact ⟨w, hw1, hw2⟩

intro word G h
  have h1 : word ∈ coerceLang (G.generatedLanguage) := h
  have h2 : ∃ w₁, w₁ ∈ G.generatedLanguage ∧ (coerceWord w₁ = word) := by
    simpa using h1
  rcases h2 with ⟨word₂, h3, h4⟩
  refine ⟨word₂, h3, by simpa using h4⟩

  have hw_def : ∃ w, w ∈ G.generatedLanguage ∧ (coerceWord (w : Word G.Z) = word) := by

  rcases hw_def with ⟨word₂, hw_mem, hw_eq⟩
  exact ⟨word₂, hw_mem, hw_eq⟩
